GigaCode
  • Managers
  • View page source

Managers

Core manager classes for buffer, index, and search management.

Overview

Managers handle the core functionality:

  • BufferManager: Code buffer lifecycle and file tracking

  • IndexManager: FAISS index creation and caching

  • SearchService: All search operations

Detailed Documentation

  • Buffer Manager
    • Overview
    • Core Class
    • Key Methods
    • State Management
    • File Tracking
    • Storage Management
    • Configuration
    • Example: Complete Buffer Lifecycle
    • See Also
  • Index Manager
    • Overview
    • Core Class
    • Key Methods
    • Phase 3 Integration
    • Example: Incremental Update
    • Configuration
    • See Also
  • Search Service
    • Overview
    • Core Class
    • Search Methods
    • Result Format
    • Advanced Features
    • Configuration
    • Performance Characteristics
    • Tuning Guide
    • See Also

Quick Reference

BufferManager:

  • Create and manage buffers

  • Track file changes

  • Handle storage

IndexManager:

  • Create FAISS indices

  • Cache indices efficiently

  • Auto-select index types (Phase 3)

  • Support incremental updates (Phase 3)

SearchService:

  • Semantic search

  • Lexical search

  • Hybrid search

  • Query caching (Phase 3)

  • Tools - CodeEmbeddingTool (main API)
